scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:release: pnpm --filter @workspace/ayotrix run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node scripts/copy-frontend-to-api.mjs
scripts.build:hostinger: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('Missing prebuilt '+p+'. Run: pnpm run build:release');process.exit(1)} console.log('Prebuilt bundle OK:', p);"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
